name: oneaiworkers
description: A small Cloudflare Worker remote MCP server for LLM-triggered actions.

OAUTH_DB.description: D1 database used by OneAIWorkers to store OAuth clients, authorization codes, and access tokens. Cloudflare creates it automatically during deployment.

MCP_SHARED_SECRET.description: Recommended. A private password for OAuth connection and manual access. Generate a long random value. You can leave it empty for a first test and add it later in Worker Settings → Variables and Secrets.

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Optional. Telegram Bot API token from BotFather. Add it only if you want OneAIWorkers to send Telegram messages. You can leave it empty and add it later.

TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.description: Optional. Default Telegram chat ID where messages should be sent. Add it only if you use Telegram notifications. You can leave it empty and add it later.

DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL.description: Optional. Discord incoming webhook URL. Add it only if you want Discord messages. You can leave it empty and add it later.

SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL.description: Optional. Slack incoming webhook URL. Add it only if you want Slack messages. You can leave it empty and add it later.

DEFAULT_WEBHOOK_URL.description: Optional. Generic webhook URL for Make, Zapier, n8n, or your own system. You can leave it empty and add it later.

CF_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Optional. Cloudflare account ID. Needed only if you want OneAIWorkers to create child Workers from safe templates. You can leave it empty and add it later.

CF_API_TOKEN.description: Optional. Scoped Cloudflare API token. Needed only for child Worker creation. Do not use your global API key. You can leave it empty and add it later.

CF_WORKERS_DEV_SUBDOMAIN.description: Optional. Your workers.dev subdomain. Used only to show expected child Worker URLs. You can leave it empty and add it later.
